name: shine-project
description: Repo-local Codex plugin that routes agents to the canonical Shine SS14 fork rules and skills.

interface.shortDescription: SS14 fork rules, skills, and review guardrails
interface.longDescription: Routes Codex and compatible agents to the repository canonical Shine Project instruction layer under .agents/rules and .agents/skills. It focuses on SS14 fork isolation, prediction, localization, modular ECS code, .NET 10 freshness checks, and narrow upstream diffs.
defaultPrompt: Use Shine rules before changing SS14 code.
Review this PR for Shine fork guardrails.
Find the right SS14 skill for this change.
